panels.title: Controller Spans (last 1h)
panels.description: Number of controller action executions observed in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS controller_spans FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'controller'

panels.title: View Renders (last 1h)
panels.description: Number of Handlebars view renders performed in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS view_renders FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'view'

panels.title: Model Operations (last 1h)
panels.description: Number of model-layer operations executed in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS model_ops FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'model'

panels.title: DB Operations (last 1h)
panels.description: Number of data-store operations, including reads and writes, in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS db_ops FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'db'

panels.title: Controller Actions per Minute
panels.description: Per-minute controller span count split by controller name.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.controller'] = 'leaderboard') AS leaderboard, countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.controller'] = 'users') AS users FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'controller' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Layer Latency Trend (avg ms)
panels.description: Per-minute average latency for controller, view, model, and db spans.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, round(avgIf(Duration, SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'controller') / 1e6, 2) AS controller_ms, round(avgIf(Duration, SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'view') / 1e6, 2) AS view_ms, round(avgIf(Duration, SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'model') / 1e6, 2) AS model_ms, round(avgIf(Duration, SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'db') / 1e6, 2) AS db_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] IN ('controller', 'view', 'model', 'db') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: MVC Layer Share (last 1h)
panels.description: Relative share of spans per MVC layer.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'controller') AS controller, countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'view') AS view, countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'model') AS model, countIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'db') AS db FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR

panels.title: Top Controller Actions
panels.description: Controller actions ranked by execution count, average latency, P95 latency, and error count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(SpanAttributes['mvc.controller'], '.', SpanAttributes['mvc.action']) AS action, SpanAttributes['mvc.transport'] AS transport, count() AS calls, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'controller' GROUP BY action, transport ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: View Render Performance
panels.description: Handlebars view render counts and latency profile per view.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanAttributes['mvc.view'] AS view, count() AS renders, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] = 'view' GROUP BY view ORDER BY renders DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Model and DB Hotspots
panels.description: Slowest model and db operations with call count and latency summary.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] AS layer, coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.model'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['db.operation'], ''), 'unknown') AS operation_group, coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['mvc.operation'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['db.operation'], ''), 'unknown') AS operation, count() AS calls, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['mvc.layer'] IN ('model', 'db') GROUP BY layer, operation_group, operation ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: MVC Metrics Streams
panels.description: Custom OTel MVC metrics emitted by the service, useful to verify metric export and naming.

targets.rawSql: SELECT MetricName AS metric, any(MetricUnit) AS unit, count() AS points, max(TimeUnix) AS last_seen FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName LIKE 'mvc.%' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY metric ASC LIMIT 50
